room.caption: [HPFF] These maps took a bit longer to make than I expected.

instance.creationCode: shiftTime=0 shiftMax=32 moveSpd=2 bShowLine=0 image_xscale=1.5 image_speed=random(0.25)+0.25 direction=270

spinSpd=3 changeDelay=0 moveSpd=0 if global.gameProgress<=4120 or global.gameProgress>=4200 {instance_destroy()}
spinSpd=-4 changeDelay=0 moveSpd=0 image_xscale=3; image_yscale=3 if global.gameProgress<=4120 or global.gameProgress>=4200 {instance_destroy()}
spinSpd=4 changeDelay=0 moveSpd=0 image_xscale=2; image_yscale=2 if global.gameProgress<=4120 or global.gameProgress>=4200 {instance_destroy()}
